title: Burj Khalifa
description:
The Burj Khalifa is indisputably the tallest building in the world. It contains high-end homes, global companies, and of course, the swanky Armani Hotel. 
At a dizzying 828 meters high, it's truly a testament to human ingenuity. Only the 124th, 125th, and 148th floors are open to the public where you get exclusive views of the Dubai skyline, sandy beaches, and azure waters of the Arabian Gulf. 
As you can imagine, the views from this shining beacon of progress in a desert by the ocean come straight from your wildest dreams.
tagline: Book Burj Khalifa tickets online to secure your preferred time slot, skip long ticket-office queues, and stand atop the world’s tallest tower

title: Dubai Frame
description:
The Dubai Frame is more than just an architectural landmark; it's a viewpoint that lets you see the city of Dubai from a height of 150 meters! This golden frame structure has a museum that offers a snapshot of Dubai's history, as well as its present. 
Moving to the top, you can look down through its glass-bottomed walkway for an adrenaline-inducing view. There, you will also find innovative projections that give a glimpse into what Dubai's future could look like.
tagline: Look over Dubai, learn the city's history, and hear future predictions at 150m high!

title: Museum of the Future
description:
The Museum of the Future is the first attraction of its kind. Built to transform the very perception of the future as we know it, the unique structure accommodates several immersive future environments that aim to position visitors in an empowering version of the future.
Home to unparalleled themes crafted by the world's leading designers, Museum of the Future explores the future of space travel and living, climate change and ecology, health, wellness, and spirituality amongst many others.
Rising 77 metres above the ground with an instantly iconic exterior, the Museum of the Future is located in the heart of Dubai, a prime location that's easy for everyone to reach.
tagline: Get a taste of the future thanks to cutting edge technology and innovative exhibits

title: Dubai Desert Safari
description:
Whatever makes your perfect Dubai desert safari, you've come to the right place. From camel rides, 4x4 dune-bashing experiences, and quad-biking excursions, to traditional cultural experiences and moonlit BBQs, there's plenty to choose from to make sure you get the best out of your adventure.
Every Dubai safari is different, with different inclusions and pacings to suit every traveler. If you're looking for high-octane trips into the sand then you'll find plenty of options including sandboarding and the famous dune bashing. For an enlightening experience, there are Dubai safari tours with henna face painting, oasis visits, and stargazing.
You can find all the prices, deals, inclusions, and other information about the best Dubai desert safaris on this page. All that's left is to do is jump on a camel or in a 4x4 and be on your way!
tagline: Embark on an adventure across the golden dunes of the Arabian desert

title: Aquaventure World
description:
Aquaventure World (formerly Aquaventure Waterpark) in Dubai, UAE, features an exciting array of rides and waterslides. 
Plus, it's home to a variety of marine wildlife, with shark, ray, and dolphin encounters available for daredevils who like to swim on the wild side!
tagline: Take a walk on the wild side with rides, slides, and animal encounters in Dubai

title: Dubai Sightseeing Cruises
description:
Looking to book a Dubai Marina Cruise? You've come to the right place. There are a whole host of options to make sure you get the most out of your Dubai Marina experience. Whether you're looking for a simple sightseeing tour of the marina or something a little more classy, you can book online quickly and easily. 
The best Dubai Marina tours will float past sights like the Ain Wheel, The Palm, Atlantis & Burj Al Arab, with options for narrated tours, lunch cruises, and more. For a memorable experience under the lights, there are dinner cruises with live music. You could choose a tour on a traditional dhow, or a totally untraditional yacht or speedboat! 
Whatever your preference, browse Dubai boat tour discounts, itineraries, and deals and secure your next adventure.
tagline: Cruise Dubai's coastline to soak in views of the modern skyline from the water

title: Sky Views Observatory
description: The Sky Walk Dubai is a steel structure between The Address' Sky View Towers in Dubai. The outside walking bridge is located on level 53 of the twin towers, and connects the two at almost 220 meters above ground. The Sky Walk Dubai is already a major attraction for adrenaline junkies.
tagline: Elevate your Dubai experience with panoramic views from this sky-high observatory

title: The Dubai Fountain
description:
The Dubai Fountain is the gushing centerpiece of the manmade 30-acre Burj Khalifa Lake, which draws crowds to the middle of Downtown Dubai. In its full glory, it's illuminated by 6,600 lights and enhanced by 25 different colored projectors.
The Dubai Fountain puts on a spectacular dance show of watery movements every day, during which streams reach up to 140 meters high, synched up to the sounds of music and flashing lights. It's one of the city's biggest tourist attractions!

title: The View at The Palm
description: Offering a glorious panoramic view of Palm Jumeirah, the Arabian Gulf, and beyond from an outdoor terrace and a premium lounge, The View on level 52 of the iconic Palm Tower is the ultimate vantage point to enjoy a drink and soak in the futuristic urban oasis of Dubai.
tagline: Marvel at Dubai's skyline from the breathtaking Palm Jumeirah observatory

title: Dubai Dolphinarium
description: Journey through the world of dolphins, seals and other marine life at the Dubai Dolphinarium. Be entertained, while taking an educational look into the lives of these fascinating aquatic mammals through playful shows in a comfortable, fully air-conditioned marine facility.

title: OliOli® Children Museum
description: Engage in hands-on activities designed for children. Explore different themed galleries featuring interactive exhibits.
tagline: Enjoy engaging activities and play in the water gallery

title: Dubai Ice Rink
description: The Dubai Ice Rink is a state-of-the-art family attraction in Dubai featuring ice skating. Glide across the Olympic-sized ice rink where unlimited fun awaits skating enthusiasts.

title: La Perle by Dragone
description: With 130 cast and crew calling its unique custom-built environs home, La Perle Habtoor City is a unique entertainment space. This 1,300 seat theater, financed by Al Habtoor features a pool with 2.7 million liters of water, and that's just part of the show.

title: XLine Dubai
description:
They don't do things by halves in Dubai, and that goes for ziplines too! Introducing the world's longest urban zipline, XLine Dubai Marina. Taking daredevils on the ride of their lives, this record-breaking thrill-ride is not for the faint of heart! Descend from a height of 170 meters and zoom through the hypermodern cityscape of Dubai, high above the world-famous marina below. You'll get a video and photos of your ride afterward. 
Take the leap, and supercharge your Dubai highlight reel with XLine Dubai Marina tickets.

title: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo
description: Dubai Aquarium & Underwater Zoo is located in the Dubai Mall. It's the largest suspended aquarium in the world, housing thousands of marine creatures from over 140 species. It's also home to the largest collection of sand tiger sharks in the world.
tagline: Dive into an aquatic world with thousands of marine species in Dubai

title: The Green Planet
description: The Green Planet is a stunning angular building in Dubai's City Walk. Inside, this standalone biodome is humid home to over 3,000 types of exotic flora and fauna. Escape the desert to wander among leafy trees, colorful birds and rushing water.

title: AURA SKYPOOL Dubai
description: Swim in the world's highest 360° infinity pool while enjoying the city skyline. Relax on the sun deck with a drink in hand.
tagline: Swim in an infinity pool and enjoy one-of-a-kind views of Dubai

title: Lost World Aquarium
description:
As part of Aquaventure World, The Lost World Aquarium expands Dubai’s only integrated marine and waterpark destination – featuring 105 record-breaking slides, one kilometre of private beach, and 26 marine experiences, including Dolphin Bay and Sea Lion Point. 
The aquarium features14 interactive and immersive themed rooms, 35 new species and 19 new habitats, now home to over 65,000 marine animals, a live mermaid show performed daily by an international team of underwater performers and educational and sustainability programs through interactive displays, behind-the-scenes tours, and the Atlantis Atlas Project.
tagline: See marine life and walk through underwater tunnels

title: Ski Dubai
description:
Ski Dubai where you can enjoy winter sports in the blazing Arabian desert. The snow here is real – they cool the interior to -6°C at night and produce the snow overnight – every morning there's fresh powder! The result is a whole lot of fun (out of the sun).
You can try out bobsledding, tobogganing and the absurdly fun Giant Ball where you literally get inside a giant plastic ball and roll down a gentle slope. You'd never guess there's a wintery oasis tucked inside the Mall of the Emirates.
tagline: Enter a winter wonderland in the middle of Dubai

title: Riva Beach Club
description: Relax by the pool and enjoy a drink from the bar. Dine at the on-site restaurant and savor fresh seafood dishes.
tagline: Swim in the pool and dine at the restaurant

title: Kidzania Dubai
description: Kidzania Dubai is a sprawling indoor playground designed for the little ones, and also for the parents looking for new ways to expel their children's energy in a fun way! Here kids can prepare for the working world via realistic setups that put them in over 40 different job roles. Kidzania Dubai is located in The Dubai Mall, in Downtown Dubai.

title: Dubai Watersports
description:
With year-round warm weather and arguably one of the world's most famous skylines, there aren't many better places to hop on a jet ski than in Dubai. 
Get ready to rip the throttle, bounce over waves, and feel the spray of the Persian Gulf as you pull tight corners and impress your friends.
tagline: Explore exciting watersports like jet skiing, flyboarding, parasailing, and more

title: Dubai Butterfly Garden
description:
The Dubai Butterfly Garden is home to more than 15,000 butterflies, spanning over 45 majestic species. Come and visit the fluttery critters, all housed in ten custom-built, climate-controlled domes.
Conceptualized by the same team behind the stunning Dubai Miracle Garden – a massive oasis of floral beauty located right next door – Dubai Butterfly Garden promises a colorful oasis filled with nature’s most beautiful winged creatures. 
Spanning over 6,673 square meters of indoor and outdoor gardens, packed with thousands of colorful plants and flowers, the garden temperature stays a comfy 18-25 degrees all year-round. It’s a perfect climate-controlled environment for all – people, plants and butterflies.

title: Abu Dhabi Day Trips from Dubai
description: Abu Dhabi Day Trips from Dubai offer visitors the opportunity to explore the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. With a range of activities and attractions, visitors can experience the rich culture and history of the region, including the stunning Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, the Emirates Palace Hotel, and the Abu Dhabi Falcon Hospital. Other popular activities include visiting the Yas Island theme parks, taking a desert safari, or enjoying a leisurely stroll along the Corniche. With convenient transportation options and knowledgeable guides, visiting Abu Dhabi is a must-do for any traveler to the UAE.
tagline: Explore Abu Dhabi's iconic landmarks and attractions in a day trip from vibrant Dubai

title: Food & Drinks Dubai
description:
Dubai is the ultimate destination for foodies and travelers looking to indulge in world-class culinary experiences. 
Known for its diverse and vibrant food scene, where you can savor flavors from traditional Emirati cuisine to fusion dishes, from street food to fine dining, Dubai has it all. 
Whether you're looking for a romantic dinner for two, a fun night out with friends, or a family-friendly food adventure, this carefully curated selection of food tours, cooking classes, wine tastings, and much more, definitely has what you need.
tagline: See why Dubai is the ultimate destination for foodies

title: Dubai Safari Park
description:
Stretching over 119 hectares, Dubai Safari Park cares for around 3,000 wild animals and has a theatre with seating for 1,000 that hosts numerous educational animal shows throughout the year. 
The reimagined Dubai Safari Park consists of five key attractions, including the African Village, Asian Village, Arabian Desert Safari, Explorer Village, and Adventure Valley. Come and visit one of the UAE's top wildlife experiences, with Dubai Safari Park tickets!
tagline: Experience Dubai Safari Park with over 3,000 wild animals

title: Ain Dubai
description:
Located at the heart of Bluewaters – the sophisticated island destination – Ain Dubai is the world's tallest observation wheel, standing at a whopping 250 meters.
Made up of 48 passenger cabins, the wheel can carry more than 1,750 visitors at once, and offers up unbeatable 360º views of Dubai's stunning architecture. You can take your pick between day, night, and sunset spins, but whatever time you choose, you're in for an incredible ride.
The location also serves as an entertainment venue if you're looking for somewhere special to celebrate.
tagline: See Dubai from 250 meters in the air

title: IMG Worlds of Adventure
description: IMG Worlds of Adventure is Dubai's newest theme park. The attractions are themed on dinosaurs, superheroes, and cartoon characters. It's located within the City of Arabia, along Sheikh Mohammad Bin Zayed Road.
tagline: Enjoy exciting rides and attractions at Dubai's top indoor park

title: At.mosphere Burj Khalifa
description: At.mosphere Burj Khalifa offers unparalleled dining on the 122nd floor of the world's tallest building. Enjoy stunning views of Dubai's skyline while savoring gourmet cuisine. Perfect for special occasions or a luxurious everyday treat.
tagline: Savor gourmet dishes while gazing at Dubai from the world's tallest tower

title: WiFi & SIM Cards Dubai
description:
Stay connected in Dubai with a variety of service products for your mobile devices. 
Gain access to WiFi as soon as you arrive – plan activities, make phone calls, and send text messages. 
Activate a digital SIM card on your smartphone and connect to Dubai's local network for easy communication and web surfing.
tagline: Stay connected in Dubai

title: Wild Wadi Waterpark
description:
Wild Wadi is the waterpark of the 21st century. It features acres of aquatic adventures and thrilling rides that defy gravity: Jumeirah Sceirah builds anticipation before dropping you down at a near-vertical 70° angle (don’t worry, it does straighten out – eventually!) and WipeOut Flowrider is one of four artificial surf stations in the world (!)
It’s not all thrills though, there are plenty of ways to chill out.  Among others, relaxing wave pools and a lazy river where you just drift along.

title: Topgolf Dubai
description: A whole lot of holes-in-one and a whole lot of holes-in-none. Topgolf Dubai promises great food, drinks and a heck of a good time. No age or experience is needed when you walk through these doors. Topgolf is everyone's game. Topgolf is a golf driving range game with electronically tracked golf balls and automatically scored drives, located in Dubai, UAE.

title: Dubai Helicopter Tours
description:
See the city of Dubai from a new angle with a helicopter tour of Dubai. 
Soar over this shimmering desert oasis with a helicopter ride at every price point. Fly above the Palm Islands, the Dubai Marina, Burj Khalifa, and Ain Dubai and see this incredible city from the air.
tagline: Wonder at Dubai's modern skyline from above

title: AYA Universe
description: Attend interactive exhibits and enjoy light displays. Explore 12 space zones where you can observe the stars, walk in the blooming gardens, and cross the infinite bridge over the river. Take photos with unique art installations.
tagline: Observe the stars, cross the infinite bridge, and watch the light shows

title: CÉ LA VI Dubai
description: A MICHELIN guide restaurant, CÉ LA VI Dubai offers contemporary Asian dining and world-class entertainment with exceptional hospitality and magnificent vistas of the glistening Dubai skyline. The landmark location is situated in the heart of Downtown Dubai and soars 220 meters above sea level, boasting one of the cities highest rooftops with a Restaurant, SkyBar, Club Lounge, and Pool Deck.
tagline: Enjoy contemporary Asian dining and world-class entertainment

title: LEGOLAND® Dubai
description: LEGOLAND® Dubai is a LEGO-based theme park for families, packed with interactive rides, waterslides, models and building experiences. LEGOLAND® Dubai is located on Sheikh Zayed Road, between Dubai and Abu Dhabi.

title: Motiongate
description: MOTIONGATE™ is Dubai's brand new film-themed park, with 27 adrenaline-charged rides, and 5 different zones that bring the silver screen to life.

title: Dubai City Tours
description:
The food, architecture, history, and culture of Dubai are all waiting for you with any one of these Dubai city tour options. 
Join a city tour to see the sparkling lights and the world's tallest skyscrapers of modern Dubai, or get a taste of the rich Emirati heritage that's still contained within the city's souks.
Beat the heat with a night tour of Dubai, or get onboard a whistle-stop bus tour before you go back to soaking up the sun.
Either way, you'll be able to find a ticket that suits you.
tagline: Discover the food, architecture, history, and culture of Dubai

title: House of Hype
description: Attend exclusive events featuring top influencers. Shop for limited edition merchandise from popular brands.
tagline: Capture photos and meet influencers at this cool location

title: Grand Hyatt Dubai Waterpark
description: Spend the day on fun water slides and relaxing by the pool. Enjoy refreshments at the onsite snack bar.
tagline: Slide down waterslides and relax in the lazy river

title: Dubai Garden Glow
description: Dubai Garden Glow is located in Zabeel Park in Dubai. This family-friendly venue invites travelers into a dazzling experience of lights and entertainment. See artistic light installations, educational activities and a live music show, all within the park's magical themed zones. No one will forget the Glow Park, an expansive artificial garden featuring more than a million energy-saving LED lights.

title: Dubai Hop-on Hop-off Tours
description: Explore the major cities of the world at your own pace with a hop-on hop-off option. With frequent departures and arrivals, an informal narrated tour available in several languages, and convenient transport highlighting all the hotspots, a hop-on hop-off tour is the perfect ticket for exploring a new city.
tagline: Explore iconic landmarks, enjoy panoramic views, and discover Dubai's charm at your own pace

title: Dubai Skydive
description:
Experience the thrill of a lifetime with a skydive over Dubai! Get a bird's eye view of the vibrant cityscape as you soar through the sky. 
Prepare for an unforgettable experience with this thrilling activity – perfect for adventure seekers and adrenaline addicts alike. 
Take the plunge and feel the incredible rush of adrenaline as you descend from the clouds. Soar through the sky and create memories that will last a lifetime. Book your skydive today and take the plunge!
tagline: Soar through the sky and create lasting memories – go skydiving in Dubai

title: ARTE MUSEUM DUBAI
description: ARTE MUSEUM DUBAI is an immersive media art exhibition showcasing works that resonate with the natural landscapes and cultural backdrop of Dubai. This is complemented by a curated F&B space known as the ARTE TEA BAR, where visitors can enjoy a teahouse experience enriched with media art.
tagline: Appreciate the natural beauty of Dubai through mixed media

title: Loco Bear - The Ultimate Entertainment Hub
description: Play a variety of arcade games and win prizes. Enjoy live performances and interactive shows.
tagline: Play arcade games and try virtual reality simulations

title: Pac-Man Live Experience Dubai
description: Navigate through a maze filled with challenges and prizes. Engage in interactive games and activities designed for all ages.
tagline: Collect Power Pellets and navigate mazes

title: iFly Dubai
description: iFly Dubai is an indoor skydiving experience in City Centre Mirdif Mall, a short distance from central Dubai.

title: Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque
description: The Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque is Abu Dhabi's most incredible religious building. It is located in Abu Dhabi, the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. It is also the largest mosque in the country, and the central place of worship for daily prayers, Friday gathering and Eid prayers.
tagline: Visit the prayer hall and walk through the courtyard

title: Museum of Illusions Dubai
description: The Museum of Illusions in Dubai offers a host of Instagram-worthy moments, including mind-bending optical illusions and magic tricks you have to see to believe! The attraction is located near Dubai Creek.

title: Aquaventure World - Dolphin & Sea Lion Experiences
description: One of the most sophisticated dolphin habitats in the world, Aquaventure World is home to a pod of majestic bottlenose dolphins. Visitors can partake in up-close-and-personal encounters with the creatures, with swimming, hugging, and diving experiences available for dolphin lovers to enjoy.
tagline: See one of the most sophisticated dolphin habitats in the world

title: Dubai City Cards
description:
There’s so much to do in Dubai, it's hard to know where to start! Luckily a Dubai city card takes care of your plans for you. 
Efficient, time-saving, and great value – a Dubai City card is your ticket to some of the best attractions in the UAE. 
Get ready to enjoy world-famous locations like Burj Khalifa, or take on experiences including desert safaris, waterparks, aquariums, and more.
tagline: Get a perfect pass to visit Dubai's famous attractions and enjoy exciting activities

title: Dubai Marina Cruises
description: The Dubai Marina is a man-made canal located on the city's modern side, near Jumeirah Beach. A cruise around Dubai's Marina offers a modern and cosmopolitan atmosphere, with a range of restaurants, cafes, waterfront dining, and a vibrant nightlife scene.
tagline: Sail past skyscrapers, savor stunning sunsets, and immerse yourself in Dubai's skyline

title: Queen Elizabeth 2 Hotel
description:
Join the Heritage Tour for a look into life aboard the Queen Elizabeth 2 during her sailing days. 
Discover British heritage through the ship's design, engineering, and maritime history that shaped this iconic vessel over five decades. 
Explore the QE2 and learn about the stories that have made her a part of history.
tagline: Tour the historic ship and enjoy dining in the onboard restaurants

title: LEGOLAND® Water Park
description: Dubai's new family attraction is filled with wet-and-wild brick-based thrills and spills. With over 20 Lego-themed rides and attractions, it's a day full of imaginative fun.

title: Dubai Parks and Resorts
description: Dubai Parks and Resorts create the thrills and spills at several theme parks in Dubai, located in different areas. Their parks include MOTIONGATE™ Dubai, Bollywood Parks Dubai, LEGOLAND® Dubai and LEGOLAND® Water Park.
tagline: The best theme parks in Dubai

title: Al Shindagha Museum
description:
The Al Shindagha Museum invites visitors to explore the innovation, resilience, and desire for progress which shaped the modern identity of Dubai. 
Learn the story of Dubai's traditional creek, delve into Dubai's history and relationship with the wider world, and discover the art of Emirati perfume-making.

title: Madame Tussauds Dubai
description: Meet more than 60 global celebrities at Madame Tussauds Dubai! Get up close with famous faces like Vin Diesel, Kylie Jenner, Audrey Hepburn, and more. You'll also find 16 brand new figures showcasing talent from the Middle East region.
tagline: Meet more than 60 global celebrities at Madame Tussauds Dubai!

title: Dinner In The Sky
description:
Dubai is synonymous with unusual. The city is home to some of the most unique structures and experiences. While there is no dearth of restaurants, especially the unusual ones, Dinner in the Sky is a dining experience like no other. Exactly as the name sounds, Dinner in the Sky is where you get to dine while floating 50 meters above the ground.
Dinner in the Sky is located in Sky Dive Dubai, where a table for 22 people is suspended in the air with the help of a crane. This unique restaurant serves lunch, dinner, and afternoon tea as well. While you enjoy the three-course meal served here, you get to check out the amazing attractions and landmarks of the city like the Palm Jumeirah, Burj Al Arab, Dubai Marina, etc.
Dinner in the Sky offers two lunch sessions and three dinner sessions, each lasting 90 minutes. During lunch and dinner, a starter, main course, and dessert are served; during the afternoon tea session, an array of savory and sweet snacks are served.

title: Airport Transfer Dubai
description:
Airport Transfer Dubai offers reliable transportation to and from Dubai International Airport. A fleet of modern vehicles ensures a comfortable journey with professional drivers who are punctual and knowledgeable, getting passengers to their destinations on time. With sedans, SUVs, and luxury cars, they cater to various group sizes. 
Safety is a priority, with adherence to regulations and comprehensive insurance coverage. Online booking is simple, guaranteeing a seamless experience. Exceptional customer service includes assistance with luggage and special requirements. Airport Transfers Dubai is the trusted choice for business or leisure travelers at Dubai International Airport.
tagline: Book reliable transportation to and from Dubai International Airport

title: Expo City Dubai
description:
Expo City Dubai is a futuristic urban development located in the heart of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. This ambitious project was specifically designed to host the World Expo 2020
Expo City Dubai features a stunning array of architectural marvels, including the iconic Al Wasl Plaza, which serves as the central hub of the site. The plaza is surrounded by intricately designed pavilions representing different countries and showcasing their unique cultures and innovations. These pavilions were constructed with cutting-edge technology and sustainable design principles.
While the World Expo has ended, Expo City Dubai continues to attract visitors and serve as a symbol of innovation, cultural exchange, and sustainable urban planning. It offers a glimpse into the future of cities and is a must-visit destination for those interested in modern architecture, technology, and international cooperation.
tagline: Explore Expo City Dubai and buy your tickets before you go

title: Dubai Gyrocopter Flight
description: Dubai Gyrocopter flights offer a unique way to see the city's landmarks from above. You'll get a chance to capture stunning aerial photos and enjoy the experience of gliding through the sky. It's a new perspective on Dubai's skyline that you won't forget.
tagline: Fly over the city, see famous landmarks and capture aerial photos

title: Noble Life Camp
description: Enjoy an evening filled with adventures such as dune bashing, desert safari, camel, rides, and more.
tagline: Taste a delicious BBQ dinner and enjoy a desert safari

title: Jumeirah Mosque
description:
The Jumeirah Mosque is the only mosque in Dubai open to non-Muslims. An Open Doors, Open Minds policy fosters understanding and friendship with other cultures. You’ll be able to appreciate the landmark building for its architecture and design, and learn about Islam and Emirati culture in a relaxed atmosphere.
Though it was built in 1976, Jumeirah Mosque is a beautiful and grand example of the traditional Fatimid building style. The building holds 1200 worshippers and yet retains an intimate atmosphere.

title: Dubai Mall
description: Part of the US $20 billion downtown Burj Khalifa development, the Dubai Mall is the largest shopping and entertainment destination in the world. It has 1,200 retail outlets, more than 160 food and beverage outlets, as well as a bunch of top-notch attractions like Dubai Aquarium, Dubai Ice Rink, SEGA Republic, and KidZania.

title: Play DXB at Dubai Mall
description:
Play DXB at Dubai Mall is the first ever (and therefore the world's largest) indoor virtual reality park. 
With 20 virtual reality experiences, you can shoot zombies, rob a bank, try parachuting and more. Play DXB at Dubai Mall is located in the Dubai Mall and is easy to reach by car or metro.
tagline: Get your fill of VR experiences at Play DXB at Dubai Mall

title: The Yellow Boats
description: The Yellow Boats is a sightseeing company based in Dubai, who operate water-bound tours and excursions along the coast of the Arabian Gulf. The company takes its name from the trademark vibrant yellow motorboats they rent out, and the equally vibrant uniforms that their staff wear. You can't miss them!

title: The Smash Room
description: The Smash Room is an experience center where visitors have the chance to unleash their anger and smash objects using weapons. It is located roughly 15 minutes' drive from the Mall of the Emirates in Dubai.

title: Riverland Dubai
description: Riverland™ Dubai is the gateway to Dubai Parks and Resorts. It's a themed, fun, dining and retail destination for the whole family. The best part? Visitors can access this part of Dubai Parks without a ticket!
tagline: Where adventures flow and cultures meet

title: Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai
description: The Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai is a luxurious and comfortable resting area, inviting you to relax and unwind before your flight. You'll find live cooking stations, free WiFi, a bar well-stocked with drinks, shower rooms, a playroom for the kids, and stylish Arabic-inspired decor, plus facilities for all types of travellers. Access to the Plaza Premium Lounge Dubai is the perfect way to unwind in an occasionally manic airport!

title: Dubai Gold Souk
description: They say all that glitters is not gold, but in Dubai it probably is! When you visit the city that's made a name for itself on luxury, you can bet that a visit to Dubai's Gold Souk is worth its weight in well... gold. The souk has more than 380 retailers, most of them dealing in jewelry, so if you're looking for a way to treat yourself, you're in the right place!

title: Al Khayma Heritage House
description: Al Khayma is a heritage restaurant that lets you indulge in Arabic culture. Alongside serving up traditional Arabic fare, guests can also enjoy some some Arabic traditions like henna tattoos, falconry, and the chance to try on some Emirati clothing.

title: Jebel Jais
description:
Jebel Jais is a mountain that crosses the borders of Oman and the United Arab Emirates. The mountain's peak of 1,934 meters is on the Oman side, with the UAE high-point reaching 1,892 meters.
The mountain is home to the epic Jebel Jais zipline, the longest zipline in the world (as accredited by Guinness World Records). This high-flying adventure is one of the main draws of Jebel Jais, which is located roughly two hours from Dubai.
tagline: Fly down the world's largest zipline

title: Dino Park Dubai
description: Dino Park Dubai is the Middle East's very first Dinosaur Park. Full of life-like animatronics, it's as close as you can get to a real-life Jurassic Park, without any of the danger. With over 120 of these incredible models, as well as dino-themed rides and attractions, it's fun for all the family.

title: Al Marmoom Conservation Reserve
description:
The Al Marmoom Conservation Reserve – located in Dubai – is the United Arab Emirates' first unfenced desert reserve. 
If you’re looking for a desert adventure close to Dubai, then you’ll find it here. The reserve encompasses more than 99 acres of desert shrub land and 10 kilometres of lakes. There’s 39 species of plants, 26 identified species of reptiles, and nine of mammals. On top of that, the area also provides sanctuary for 19 endangered animal species, and flocks of 300-500 flamingos.

title: Atlantis The Palm
description: Dubai has never been afraid of being a little ostentatious and nothing says 'we're fabulous' like Atlantis The Palm. This iconic entertainment destination was literally pulled from the ocean, like the real Atlantis in reverse, and is comprised of two world-class resorts that pride themselves on extraordinary experiences. Discover a world of family fun across dining, entertainment, and wellness experiences.

title: Trampo Extreme Dubai
description:
Trampo Extreme is a trampoline park located in the Dubai Mall. The family-friendly parks have tons of trampolines, with a range of 16 different jump activities, making it the perfect place to jump-start energy levels and get moving.
Kids 3 years and above can master their trampoline flips, challenge themselves on climbing walls, dunk a basketball on the jump courts, play a dodgeball game, or dive in the foam pit – the options are endless!

title: 3D Blacklight Minigolf Dubai
description: 3D Blacklight Minigolf Dubai is a unique blacklight indoor Minigolf experience for the whole family! It's located in a convenient, air-conditioned setting, in the middle of Dubai Marina at JBR, Bahar Plaza Level.

title: Dubai Hot Air Balloon Tours
description:
Explore the breathtaking beauty of Dubai from up high with a hot air balloon tour! 
As you float above the city, you'll be able to take in Dubai's amazing views from a unique and unforgettable perspective. 
Witness the amazing architecture, the bustling streets, and the stunning desert landscape – it's an experience you won't soon forget!
tagline: Soar above Dubai on a Hot Air Balloon Tour: an unforgettable adventure!

title: East Coast Day Trips from Dubai
description:
Experience the best of Dubai's East Coast on an unforgettable day trip! 
Get ready for a day of adventure and fun. Explore this beautiful region's unique culture and history, with its stunning landscapes and vibrant local communities. 
See the amazing architecture, sample delicious local cuisine, and take in the breathtaking views. 
Whether you're looking for a relaxing day out or something a bit more lively, an East Coast day trip is sure to have something to satisfy everyone.
tagline: Discover Dubai's East Coast in an unforgettable day of adventure

title: Deep Dive Dubai
description:
Don't miss the thrilling Deep Dive Dubai – a world of unique scuba, snorkelling and freediving opportunities at the NAS Sports Complex in Dubai. Inspired by the UAE’s rich pearl-diving heritage of the past, this is also the world’s deepest and largest underwater attraction! 
Take the plunge and explore an abandoned and flooded city that's yours to swim around at an incredible 60 meters underwater.
Created for both professional and beginner divers, Deep Dive Dubai allows novices to explore in the safety of a controlled diving environment. Filled with 14-million liters of warm water, it opens up new adventures for experienced divers and thrill-seekers who want to go deeper than usual pools allow.
tagline: Swim in the world's deepest pool and explore an underwater city

title: The Storm
description: This indoor Storm Coaster in UAE promises unbelievable feelings you have never experienced before. It is a unique indoor roller coaster that makes an incredible vertical drop at a high speed and offers a blood-boiling ride with twists and turns. Storm Roller Coaster makes its way throughout the whole building of Dubai Hills Mall. The attraction is 670 meters long and includes a completely vertical launch. Riders can be pushed as high as 50m up into the building. It has a max speed of 41 kilometer per hour.

title: Escape Hunt Dubai
description: Escape Hunt Dubai is packed with mysteries and excitement, you and your teammates will leap into new worlds to complete ground-breaking missions. Work as a team to find clues, solve puzzles and complete challenges before the time runs out. This isn’t something you watch, it’s something you experience – right in the heart of the action.
tagline: Escape Hunt Dubai is packed with mysteries and excitement, against the ticking clock!

title: Dubai Crocodile Park
description: Dubai Crocodile Park is an extraordinary facility that encompasses 20,000 sqm of land and water, serving as a home to more than 250 Nile crocodiles. With great attention to detail, it has crafted an exceptional environment to ensure the utmost comfort for these majestic creatures. Alongside this, it takes pride in presenting a specialized Crocodile Aquarium and an unparalleled Crocodile Museum that delve into the captivating realm of the Nile Crocodile, providing visitors with an immersive exploration of their natural history. Experience a captivating exhibition showcasing the natural environment of crocodiles, complete with lakes, waterfalls, islands, and sandbanks. Visitors can marvel at enormous Nile Crocodiles measuring 5 meters in length, offering multiple view points for observation. Discover an unparalleled museum dedicated to the evolution of crocodile and their remarkable adaptations that enabled them to survive the extinction of the dinosaurs. Immerse yourself in a distinctiv

title: The Dubai Balloon
description:
Soar to exhilarating heights of up to 300 meters, equivalent to a 100-story building, and bask in the feeling of being on top of the world. Be captivated by the breathtaking silhouette of Palm Jumeirah while immersing yourself in the awe-inspiring vistas of Dubai and its shimmering skyline. The Dubai Balloon At Atlantis isn't just an ordinary observation point; it's an unforgettable experience.
Located at the world-renowned entertainment hub, Atlantis, the Palm, and the record-breaking Aquaventure Waterpark, The Dubai Balloon offers a once-in-a-lifetime adventure. Whether you're with friends or bringing the whole family, this is a bucket list experience not to be missed. Kids under the age of three can join in on the fun, as they get to enjoy The Dubai Balloon for free, ensuring that cherished memories are made for all.

title: Alexandra Dhow Cruises Dubai
description: Established in 2008, Alexandra Dhow Cruises stands as a renowned floating restaurant in Dubai Marina, celebrated for its exceptional service. Discover Dubai Marina on a boat with a nice atmosphere, which could include a meal.
tagline: Embark on a cruise admiring Dubai's skyline and scenic views of this luxurious desert oasis

title: Boat Cruises Dubai Creek
description: Situated in old Dubai, near Deira and Bur Dubai, Dubai Creek has a rich history and has been the center of trade and commerce in Dubai for centuries. On a boat cruise, you can appreciate Dubai's natural saltwater creek, which separates the city into two main areas, Deira and Bur Dubai. Spot historical markets, souks, and historic buildings.
tagline: Admire the city's skyline and experience the waterfront charm of Dubai Creek

title: Dhow Cruises Dubai
description: Sail across Dubai in a dhow, which is a traditional wooden boat commonly used in the region and endowed with centuries of maritime history. As you cruise along Dubai Creek or Dubai Marina, you'll be treated to a scenic journey that showcases the city's rich history and futuristic skyline in perfect harmony.
tagline: Admire the cityscape and enjoy scenic views aboard a traditional dhow vessel

title: Dubai Canal Cruises
description: Dubai's extensive network of canals connects Dubai Creek to the Arabian Gulf, and branches out to various neighborhoods, contributing to Dubai's efficient and picturesque waterway system. Pick a canal cruise that suits you, though whichever one you pick guarantees a scenic ride.
tagline: Sail through the Dubai Canal, marvel at modern architecture while enjoying scenic views

title: Dubai Cruises with Dinner
description: This selection of Dubai cruises with dinner offers unique dining experiences amidst the stunning backdrop of the city's skyline. As the sun sets over the Arabian Gulf, passengers can enjoy a meal while gently gliding along the tranquil waters. These cruises often feature a variety of international and local cuisines, music, and panoramic views.
tagline: Wine and dine while cruising past Dubai's famous skyline

title: Lotus Cruises Dubai
description: Cruising in Dubai is a luxurious experience that combines the beauty of the city's modern skyline with the serenity of its pristine waters. This selection includes cruises to Dubai Creek, and Dubai Marina, as well as intimate dinner cruises.
tagline: Witness Dubai's modern skyline, onboard a luxurious cruise

title: Yacht Trips Dubai
description: Cruising on a yacht in Dubai is a luxury and captivating experience that allows you to explore the city from a different perspective. As you set sail along the crystal-clear waters of the Arabian Gulf, you'll be treated to breathtaking views of Dubai's iconic landmarks, including the Burj Al Arab, Palm Jumeirah, and the stunning waterfront skyline. Yacht cruises in Dubai are known for their luxurious amenities, attentive crew, and a variety of packages, from intimate gatherings to extravagant parties.
tagline: Sail along Dubai's stunning coastline and admire the city skyline from a yacht

tagline: Indulge in luxury, retail therapy and unexpected delights!

tagline: Escape the glitz and glamour of Dubai and head to a community park east of the city

title: Wafi City
tagline: Wander around a shopping complex modeled after ancient Egypt in Dubai

title: Atlantis The Royal
description:
Atlantis The Royal is one of the most ultra-luxury experiential resorts in the world.
Crafted by the world’s leading designers, architects, and artists, this is a destination where everything has been designed to challenge the boundaries of imagination. 
Atlantis The Royal provides various services, including extraordinary stays, culinary mastery, iconic nightlife, and incredible attractions.
tagline: Visit one of the world's most ultra-luxury resorts made by top designers, architects, and artists

title: Real Madrid World
description:
Discover the iconic Real Madrid World, a must-visit for football fans and adventure seekers alike!  
Experience the winning spirit of Real Madrid C.F. and enjoy 16 thrilling rides and attractions.
tagline: Enjoy over 40 Real Madrid-themed experiences and attractions in one place

title: Dubai Bus Tours
description:
A bus tour of Dubai offers a convenient and efficient way to see the city's top attractions, including iconic landmarks like the Burj Khalifa and Palm Jumeirah. 
Sit back and relax as you are taken on a guided journey through the bustling streets, allowing you to take in the city's vibrant culture and stunning architecture all in one trip. Plus, with knowledgeable tour guides providing commentary along the way, you can gain valuable insights into Dubai's history and development.
tagline: See more of Dubai on a convenient tour bus

title: Saffron Restaurant at Atlantis The Palm
description:
Indulge in a culinary experience at Saffron Restaurant at Atlantis The Palm and feast on an array of Asian dishes from various regions. 
Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere with live cooking stations and lively entertainment. Sample authentic flavors and savor every bite as you dine in a luxurious setting overlooking the stunning Dubai skyline
tagline: Savor delicious flavors and enjoy vibrant entertainment in a luxurious Dubai setting

title: Kaleidoscope at Atlantis The Palm
description:
Open for breakfast, lunch and dinner, you can taste your way around the world without ever leaving Dubai. 
Serving international dishes all day, you are bound to find something you'll like from their fresh menu.
tagline: Enjoy an international menu in Dubai

title: Gastronomy at Atlantis The Royal
description:
Bring your appetite with you at your next stay in Dubai!
Enjoy breakfast or dinner at this swanky hotel along the beach with international options from the freshest ingredients.
tagline: Dine like royalty in Dubai

tagline: Shop at high-end stores and watch the dancing fountains

title: Jumeirah Beach (JBR Beach)
description: Relax on the sandy shores and soak up the sun. Enjoy a swim in the clear waters and dine at nearby restaurants.
tagline: Swim in the clear water and shop at the nearby boutiques

title: Dubai Marina
description: Take a walk along the promenade and enjoy the views of the yachts. Visit the numerous restaurants and try different cuisines.
tagline: Take a boat ride and shop at the waterfront mall

title: Dubai Platinum Heritage Safari
description:
Experience the Dubai Platinum Heritage Safari for a luxury desert adventure. Travel in vintage Land Rovers and discover the desert's wildlife as expert guides share rich insights. 
Enjoy a gourmet dinner under the stars at a private camp. Witness traditional performances, and falconry, and join a camel ride. This eco-friendly tour offers a blend of culture and comfort. It's an unforgettable journey into the heart of the Arabian desert.
tagline: Explore dunes and enjoy gourmet dining under the stars

title: Dubai Jet Ski
description: Experience the fun of riding the waves on a jet ski in Dubai, where you can explore the stunning coastline and iconic landmarks of Dubai from a unique perspective. Whether you're a seasoned rider or a first-timer, you'll have a good time on the water.
tagline: Glide past the Palm Jumeirah and feel the rush of the open sea

title: AURA SKYPOOL
tagline: The world's highest 360 infinity pool overlooking the Dubai Marina skyline

title: Mercedes-Benz Off Road Experience Centre
description: Test drive a variety of off-road vehicles on different terrains. Learn advanced driving techniques from experienced instructors.
tagline: Test drive off-road vehicles and navigate challenging terrains

title: Titanic - A Voyage Through Time Dubai
description: Play a variety of arcade games and win prizes. Enjoy interactive activities and have fun with friends.
tagline: Play virtual reality games and race go-karts

title: Dinosaurs - The Immersive Odyssey Dubai
description: See life-sized dinosaur models and learn about prehistoric creatures. Enjoy interactive exhibits and educational displays.
tagline: See lifelike dinosaur models and walk through prehistoric-themed exhibits

title: Paris Paradis Dubai
description: Enjoy themed experiences and events. Dine at various international restaurants.
tagline: Visit the Eiffel Tower replica and sample French cuisine

title: Louvre Abu Dhabi
description: Saadiyat Island's latest addition is a true cultural powerhouse! A unique collaboration between the Parisian Louvre and the UAE government, the groundbreaking Louvre Abu Dhabi contains hundreds of priceless works by some of history's greatest artists.
tagline: Explore a museum of civilizations with art from around the globe in Abu Dhabi

title: Yas Island
description:
Yas Island is a premier destination offering a blend of entertainment, shopping, and leisure activities. It features attractions like theme parks, a waterpark, and the renowned Yas Marina Circuit, home to the Formula One Grand Prix. 
Visitors can also enjoy free activities such as strolling along the marina and relaxing at its scenic beaches.
tagline: Have exhilarating adventures and unwind on sun-kissed beaches

title: Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi
description:
Discover the story of Earth through science, nature, and innovation at the Natural History Museum Abu Dhabi. 
Located in the Saadiyat Cultural District of Abu Dhabi, you can view a wide range of fossils and artifacts, and attend educational programs and workshops.
tagline: See dinosaur skeletons and ancient fossils

title: Ferrari World
description:
The world’s largest indoor theme park awaits and it’s devoted to the world’s most prestigious brand. You’ll speed through the park as you race to the thrilling rides.
The jewel in the crown is Formula Rossa, the world’s fastest rollercoaster. It accelerates to a speed of 240 km/h on the straightaways. And then there's the twists and turns... white-knuckle adrenaline-pounding excitement! Of course, you can also slow the pace down with a whole host of family-oriented attractions.
tagline: Increase your speed in Abu Dhabi

title: Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi
description:
Welcome to Warner Bros. World™ Abu Dhabi, the world’s first-ever Warner Bros. branded indoor theme park! As you set foot through the iconic Warner Bros. shield, prepare to be transported to the lands of your favorite characters for a one-of-a-kind immersive experience.
The excitement begins at the Warner Bros. Plaza, your portal to uniquely themed lands including Bedrock, Dynamite Gulch, Cartoon Junction, Gotham City, and Metropolis. Hungry for action and adventure or a dash of whimsical fun? Experience 29 exhilarating rides, interactive family-friendly attractions, and unique live entertainment for memories that will last a lifetime.
Don’t miss the chance to walk alongside some of the world’s most iconic characters, including Batman, Superman and Wonder Woman, and watch your childhood memories come to life as you meet Bugs Bunny, Scooby-Doo, Tom and Jerry, and your favorite modern stone-age family, The Flintstones.

title: Qasr Al Watan Palace
description: Qasr Al Watan Palace is part of the Presidential Palace complex in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Completed in 2017, this culturally significant landmark is open to the public and houses a beautiful Great Hall, various exhibitions of important Emirati artifacts, and a vast scholarly library.
tagline: Tour the grand halls and learn about the region's history

title: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi
description: SeaWorld Abu Dhabi offers a chance to explore marine habitats and interact with its inhabitants, from dolphins and orcas to sea lions and tropical fish. It's a place that lets you appreciate the intelligence of these aquatic beings up-close. But it's not all about the fun; there's an important educational aspect too. SeaWorld Abu Dhabi is actually a hub where you can learn about how teams of marine experts and conservationists are working to safeguard the world's oceans and their inhabitants.
tagline: Discover marine habitats, meet aquatic creatures, and learn about ocean conservation.

title: Etihad Towers - Observation Deck at 300
description:
Etihad Towers is a complex of buildings with five towers in Abu Dhabi, the capital city of the United Arab Emirates. 
The towers are located opposite the Emirates Palace hotel and feature offices, apartments, and a hotel, the tallest of which is Tower 2, which stands at an impressive 305 meters tall.
On Level 74 of Tower 2 in the Conrad Abu Dhabi Etihad Towers, you'll find the highest observation deck in Abu Dhabi. This isn't just a spot for views; it's a sophisticated lounge and café. Here, you can relax in style and take in the city from above.
tagline: At 300m high, enjoy full circle views from the Observation Deck at 300, paired with a unique café and lounge setting in Abu Dhabi’s Etihad Towers

title: Mamsha Beach Saadiyat
description: Relax on the sandy shores and soak up the sun. Enjoy a refreshing swim in the clear waters.
tagline: Swim in clear water and relax at a beachside lounge

title: Saadiyat Beach Club Abu Dhabi
description: The quality of the services along with the views offered by the club's magnificent position is the perfect introduction to its surroundings, legendary service, and top hospitality! Luxurious & exclusive in vibe, with a large pinch of lovely island charm, Saadiyat Beach Club is the kind of place where it is easy to just let the hours pass by.

title: teamLab Phenomena Abu Dhabi
description: Interact with digital art installations that respond to movement. Walk through immersive rooms filled with colorful projections.
tagline: Interact with digital art and navigate through light installations

title: Yas Waterworld
description:
Yas Waterworld is home to 43 rides, five of them world firsts. It’s 37 acres of wet, watery fun and the best way to cool off in the sun. Adrenaline junkies are served by the likes of Bubble’s Barrel, a high-intensity, looping waterside, and they'll also find the world’s largest surfable wave sheet (gnarly, bro!).
Chill-seekers are also catered to, with plenty of soothing smooth rides like the lazily winding Al Rava River. So whatever level of intensity you want your water activities, you'll find it here at Yas Waterworld.

title: Yas Marina Circuit
description:
The Yas Marina Circuit is one of the world’s most advanced Formula 1 circuits and the venue for the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix. It took a staggering 35 million hours to build!
Situated just 30 minutes from Abu Dhabi, it offers visitors the chance to step behind the scenes of the world of racing. The circuit has five grandstand areas – Main Grandstand, West Grandstand, North Grandstand, South Grandstand, and Marina Grandstand.
tagline: Witness one of the world’s most advanced F1 circuits

title: Zayed National Museum
description: Explore exhibits on the history and culture of the UAE. View artifacts from ancient civilizations and modern times.
tagline: Learn about UAE history and view cultural artifacts

title: Qasr Al Hosn
description: Qasr Al Hosn is the oldest stone building in Abu Dhabi. Now a cultural history museum dedicated to preserving Emirati culture, it used to serve as the seat of government. The fort's stone defense tower was the first permanent structure in the now-capital of the UAE.

title: The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi
description:
The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi is one of the largest aquariums in the Middle East, taking visitors on a spectacular journey through 10 cleverly themed zones, and immersing you beneath a frozen ocean, a flooded forest, hidden treasures in an Atlantic Cave, and lots more. The National Aquarium Abu Dhabi is home to 46,000 animals from the tropical waters of the Pacific and freshwaters of the Amazon, through to the frozen ice caps of the Arctic and the caves of the Mediterranean 
The aquarium houses more than 200 sharks and rays, representing 25 different species. All of the animals are obtained according to stringent guidelines and are cared for by a team of 80 sea life experts. A whole department is dedicated to education with a capacity to welcome 50,000 school children a year. The aquarium is easily accessible from Abu Dhabi island and adjacent to the neighboring five-star hotels, in a prime location for both residents and tourists.
tagline: Witness 46,000 marine animals from the waters of Pacific and Amazon

title: Emirates Park Zoo
description:
Meet white tigers, lions, and Siberian bears at the Emirates Park Zoo, home to more than 1,500 animals and 225 different species. 
Visit the huge variety of animals in different areas of the zoo, like Snake Alley, Giraffe Park, Primate Parade, Petting Zoo, Camel Farm, Mammal Cave, and many more.
tagline: Witness a diverse variety of animals and species

title: Abu Dhabi City Tours
description:
Explore the vibrant city of Abu Dhabi with a city tour! 
From its modern skyline to its lively culture, Abu Dhabi offers something for everyone. A city tour offers a truly memorable experience where you can immerse yourself in the city's sights, sounds, and flavors.
Enjoy a guided tour of the city, learning about its history and culture while admiring its remarkable architecture or take the self-guided route. 
Whether you're looking for a day out or a weekend away, a city tour in Abu Dhabi adds to your amazing experience.
tagline: Discover Abu Dhabi with a memorable city tour experience!

title: Abu Dhabi Desert Safari
description: Experience the thrill of a desert safari in Abu Dhabi! Explore the dunes of the Arabian Desert in a 4x4 and enjoy a true adventure, complete with a BBQ dinner and live entertainment. Take in the breathtaking scenery and marvel at the sunset - it's an unforgettable experience you'll never forget!
tagline: Experience the magic of a desert safari in Abu Dhabi

title: Kai Beach Saadiyat
description:
Gaze at azure waters and the stunning sunsets from the comfort of our beach lounge chairs and freshen up before heading out for a delicious bite from a food truck by MLT.
Kai Beach Saadiyat is paradise wrapped in soft, white sands, lapped by warm turquoise waters and hidden in the heart of Saadiyat Island. Be transported you to a dreamlike atmosphere to rest, connect with yourself and have a perfect beach getaway. The 500-meter stretch of pristine shores is there to welcome you every day from 7am till sunset.
tagline: Paradise in the heart of Saadiyat Island

title: Abu Dhabi Sightseeing Cruises
description:
The best way to cool off from the intense Abu Dhabi sunshine? Take to the water in a sleek, modern speedboat and carve waves of cool ocean spray across the sparkling Arabian Gulf.
With expert skippers who can fill you in on the UAE's history, culture, and traditions, it's the easiest, breeziest way to brush up on the local history as you put sightseeing on cruise control.  
There are plenty of options available to suit a wide range of needs, with tours departing from lots of spots around Abu Dhabi.
Take a look at these awesome Abu Dhabi cruises, and see which one floats your boat!
tagline: Marvel at the skyline views and savor the beauty of the Arabian Gulf from the water

title: SIM Cards Abu Dhabi
description:
Discover Abu Dhabi with a sim card! Enjoy a fuss-free connection to the internet and make the most of your stay in the city. With these sim cards, you can stay connected to friends and family, while exploring the city. 
Get instant access to maps, phone numbers, and other essential information. Whether you’re a tourist or a local, these reliable sim cards are the perfect way to stay connected in Abu Dhabi. Get yours today and enjoy your stay with no worries!
tagline: Stay connected in Abu Dhabi with a reliable sim card!

title: Snow Abu Dhabi
description: Snow Abu Dhabi extends a warm invitation to all those young at heart, as well as the youngsters, to come together and gear up for an incredible escapade in the snow. Embark on a delightful exploration of the Snowflake Garden, brace yourselves for exhilarating rides, and fasten your seatbelts for an immersive snowy adventure in our enchanting forest, and much more.
tagline: Experience a magical winter wonderland at Snow Abu Dhabi

title: Yas Marina
description: Yas Marina is a port for local boat tours, as well as the site of the Abu Dhabi Grand Prix, a prominent race on the Formula 1 championship calendar. It is located on Yas Island, about 30 minutes from Abu Dhabi city center.

title: KidZania Abu Dhabi
description: Let the kids loose in a 55,000 square foot scaled replica of a real city, where learning and fun are rolled into one! KidZania Abu Dhabi tickets get you into a huge world of adventure, where learning and entertainment combine perfectly. KidZania is home to lots of immersive fun and more than 40 role-playing activities for children aged 4-16. It's a great place for developing life skills that simply cannot be taught in the classroom.

title: Abu Dhabi Water Sports
description:
Discover all that Abu Dhabi has to offer and chase your thrills with water sports! 
Whether you're a beginner or an advanced water sports enthusiast, Abu Dhabi has something to offer. You'll find a range of exciting activities to enjoy on the crystal-clear waters,
With beautiful views and warm sunshine, Abu Dhabi is the perfect destination for a water sports adventure. Come and experience the buzz of Abu Dhabi's water sports scene for yourself!
tagline: Experience the thrill of a water sports adventure in Abu Dhabi!

title: Pixoul Gaming
description:
Pixoul Gaming features world-class eSports and Virtual Reality games in one single gaming complex. Visitors will have the chance to immerse themselves in online gaming through the latest technology from a variety of virtual reality simulators.
Pixoul will also include the first-ever certified eSport academy in the region with the mission of highlighting the importance of playing responsibly.

title: Velocity Slide Abu Dhabi
description:
Velocity is the longest and tallest stainless-steel slide in the Middle East and it’s located at WTC Mall.
The two stainless steel slides stretch from the top level of the mall to the bottom, with twists and turns that tempt you to take the plunge. 
Velocity’s slides are 68-metres and 54-metres long and have a sliding speed of two to three meters per second. The megastructure has a transparent section to give you a view of the mall as you slide.

title: Jubail Mangrove Park
description: Take a trip to Jubail Mangrove Park, the first of its kind in Abu Dhabi. You'll find a sanctuary for birds and marine life native to the region. This spot serves as an educational platform about mangrove habitats, important for Abu Dhabi's coastline protection and biodiversity support.
tagline: Walk down a winding boardwalk as you learn about Abu Dhabi's mangrove habitats

title: Adrenark Adventure
description: Welcome to Adrenark, the biggest indoor park in the area! It's a place for everyone - kids, teenagers, and adults to enjoy a bit of fun and a dash of friendly competition. Challenge yourself with exciting activities, test your gaming skills or indulge in everyday treats at the food court.
tagline: Play games, challenge yourself, and grab a bite at the food court!

tagline: Tour the grand halls and view the impressive architecture

tagline: Walk through the mangroves and spot diverse bird species
